construct_verdict_reason: Most items measure tolerance attitudes, but p54_5, p54_6, and p54_8 measure actual social contact/friendship patterns rather than openness or acceptance beliefs.

items.reason: Directly measures opinion on how cultural differences should be managed in society, core to the construct.
Measures actual friendship composition (behavioral outcome) rather than openness or acceptance toward religious diversity.
Measures actual friendship composition based on political views rather than tolerance or acceptance attitudes.
Measures actual friendship composition with homosexuals rather than acceptance or openness toward homosexuality.
Directly measures acceptance and support for rights of homosexual couples, core attitudinal component of tolerance.
Measures willingness to accept people of different religions in close proximity, reflecting openness to religious diversity.
